prompt: Create a realistic full-body studio fashion portrait of exactly two young children standing side by side against a warm seamless beige-brown backdrop, centered with generous empty space around them and soft floor shadows. The child on the left is about 6 years old, slightly taller, with voluminous curly medium-brown hair, wearing a cream oversized sweatshirt under loose faded blue denim overalls, hands tucked in the overall pockets, a small pendant necklace, and worn black low-top sneakers. The child on the right is about 6 years old, slightly shorter, with messy short dark hair, wearing a relaxed horizontal striped sweater in muted brown, tan, cream, rust, and charcoal tones with a small yellow smiley patch on the chest, dark cuffed jeans, white socks, black-and-white high-top sneakers, hands in pockets, and a small pendant necklace. Both children face the camera with calm neutral posture, but their faces are intentionally anonymized by smooth rectangular skin-tone blur blocks with no visible facial features. Use warm cinematic studio lighting, shallow depth of field, high-end editorial children’s fashion styling, natural fabric texture, realistic proportions, muted earthy color palette, 16:9 horizontal composition, no text, no logos except generic shoe styling, no extra people or props.
